description_long: An adult pedestrian figure is depicted standing upright, with a realistic human form and proportions. The individual is dressed in a sleeveless top and long pants, with visible shoes on their feet. The person has short, neatly styled hair and a neutral facial expression. Unusually, a large, rectangular wooden frame is positioned over one shoulder, extending diagonally behind and in front of the figure, as if being carried or worn. The frame appears to be made of wood, with a smooth finish and visible edges. The overall appearance suggests a person in an urban environment, possibly transporting or interacting with a large object.
description: A standing adult pedestrian carrying a large wooden frame over one shoulder, dressed in casual attire with short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, torso, and the wooden frame extending diagonally over the right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the person and the full length of the wooden frame extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the person's head and body, with the wooden frame extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the person's profile and the wooden frame extending forward and backward.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless top and long pants in a casual style
